events.name: Frühlingsfest
events.description:
Our annual spring festival, celebrating German bier kultur!

Friday 5/8 - Monday 5/11

lagers music steins pretzels bratwurst kölsch service

events.name: Kill the Keg! Seattle Beer Week Kickoff!
events.description:
We're throwing a SBW Kickoff Party and tapping up the Official Beer of Seattle Beer Week to celebrate! Come be amongst the 1st to try it … and help us be the 1st to Kill the Keg with $5 Pints till it kicks! Kids & Dogs welcome!


https://www.ounceswestseattle.com/sbw

events.name: Seattle Cask-O-Rama!
events.description:
TWELVE Seattle breweries,
TWELVE casks on the bartop!

events.name: Tour De Pints
events.description:
Join the throng of around 100 riders on a looping route through North Seattle neighborhoods - Fremont, Ballard, Greenwood, Ravena, and more. The route is still a secret but will be announced shortly before the ride!

The Tour De Pints is Seattle's biggest bike and brew ride since 2011. We'll take a safe route that avoids busy car roads as much as possible and suitable for all skill levels. You can't avoid North Seattle hills though so be ready for just a bit of that!

We'll visit five breweries - some old route favorites (it wouldn't be a Tour De Pints without Flying Bike!) and some new places we've never had on the route before. The route is roughly a 20 mile loop, starting at a different brewery near where it begins!

Swag raffles will take place at each brewery with the biggest and best prizes saved for the final location!

Sign up at TourDePints.com

events.name: Seattle Vs. Olympia Hot Dog Relay Throwdown
events.description:
Join us at Halcyon Brewing for our 2nd annual Hot Dog Relay Throwdown as we pit 3 Seattle breweries (Halcyon, Big Time and Ladd & Lass) vs. 3 Olympia breweries (Ilk, 3 Magnets and Well 80. In addition to the brewers competition, consumers can enter the competition with teams of 3. The winners will receive a be-jewelled belt a multitude of schwag and gift cards.

Competition format: Teams of 3 and each person needs to consume one hot dog and drink one pint of beer before the next person goes. The fastest team wins.

events.name: Pine Box Beer Can Derby
events.description:
The race is on! Come & try your luck racing cans cub scout style down the tracks to beer glory. Join us at 3pm to purchase a beer, canned of course, & a race kit. We’ll race in heats starting at 5pm w/ prizes for 1st, 2nd, & 3rd + most attractive car! Tools will be provided. Cub scout gear encouraged! See you at the starting line.

3pm to 5pm - Build Time 
5pm - RACE TIME!!

ALL CARS MUST PASS INSPECTION TO QUALIFY FOR THE RACE Following are the inspection points 
1. The can weight shall not exceed 5.0 ounces. The official race scale shall be considered final. 
2. The overall length of the can shall not exceed 7 inches. 
3. The overall width of the can shall not exceed 2 ¾ inches. 
4. The can must have 1 ¾” clearance between the wheels. 
5. The can must have 3/8” clearance underneath the body. 
6. The can may be shaped any way that is desired. 
7. The can must be freewheeling, with no starting devices. 
8. You must use official Pine Box Wheels and Axles, YOUR CAN CAR MUST BE BUILT ON SITE.

Each can must pass inspection by the official inspection committee  before it will be allowed to compete. The Inspection Committee has the  responsibility to disqualify those cans that do not meet these  specifications.

Hosted by New Belgium Brewing

events.name: Crafting with Mom!
events.description:
We've partnered with CraftLab Seattle for a Mother's Day Event, special for Seattle Beer Week! Come craft, color and enjoy an afternoon of drinks, food & fun with Mom on her special day! Coloring & activities are FREE! Crafting projects available for a small fee. Kids & Dogs Welcome!


https://www.ounceswestseattle.com/sbw

events.name: THIS IS WASHINGTON DAMMIT!
events.description:
Thirty Washington beers from thirty breweries!
All $5 PINTS! All day, All night!

events.name: XBP Limited Liquids 3rd Anniversary
events.description: Washington’s premier mysterious guy beer distribution network turns 3! Some of our most beloved breweries from in-and-out-of-state will be featured. Record vendor pop-up’s and DJ’s to start, karaoke after party.

events.name: Pint Night Benefitting Pink Boots Society
events.description: Join us to celebrate women and non-binary people in the fermented beverage industry. $1 per pint donated to The Western Washington chapter of Pink Boots Society. Meet the brewers that made the All Queens Hoppy Blonde Ale for the 2026 Pink Boots Collaboration Collective.

events.name: 10 Years of Not Forgetting to Party - with Hama Hama Oyster Co, Bizarre, Holy Mountain & ilk
events.description: It's Sisters and Brothers' 10th Anniversary! Weird! So, in a full fledged effort to remind all of you wonderful people to not forget to party, we're getting the buddies together for some Hama Hama-fied Sisters and Brothers jams concocted by Hama Hama Oyster Co's Head Chef Dillon Pennell along with a special Bizarre/Holy Mountain/ilk collab beer.

events.name: 3rd Annual Brewer's Wing Competition
events.description:
One of the most popular events every year! Watch as 10 local brewers compete with their best shot at chicken wings! 10 sauces, 10 local beers, 1 winner.
Your ticket includes 10 wings and 10 beers (4oz). Buy your ticket here for $25 or at the door for $30

Get Tickets Here!

events.name: BODACIOUS BEVERAGES!
events.description:
Twenty rare & unusual beers from around the world!
Barrel-aged brews, sour beers, hoppy stuff, and more!
Taster trays & designated drivers encouraged!

events.name: Bulgogi Sub Night at Super Deli Mart
events.description:
IT’S BACK
Yes… the Bulgogi Sub you’ve been asking about

After a long wait, our fan-favorite Bulgogi Sub is finally back at Super Deli Mart.
Toasted hoagie roll, mayo, savory bulgogi, and melted provolone… simple, messy, perfect

Buy a pint, get a Bulgogi Sub for $5
Thursday, May 14
Starting at 5PM (until we run out)

You already know… these don’t last long.

events.name: Birds & Beer
events.description:
Come meet the Falconer and some of his bird friends at Ounces, special for Seattle Beer Week! He’ll be roaming around for up-close-and-personal encounters with his trained raptor friends. You may even get to hold one! FREE! Kids Welcome!


https://www.ounceswestseattle.com/sbw

events.name: Beer and Chocolate Pairing Class
events.description:
Flying Bike Cooperative Brewery and Chocolate Spiel are teaming up for a fun night of beer and chocolate. During this class, you will be led through a flight of co-op beers paired with different Chocolate Spiel chocolates. You will learn how cacao is grown, how chocolate is made, and how to pair beer with chocolate to bring out complex layered flavors. Secure your tickets now for a night of high-level tasting and "tasty-good" fun!
https://www.eventbrite.com/e/craft-beer-bean-to-bar-chocolate-pairing-tickets-1985322976466?aff=oddtdtcreator

events.name: The Hall's Night at the Ballpark!
events.description:
Your ticket includes incredible food, a featured Seattle Beer Week beer, and a ticket to the game! Pre-game at Occidental Hall by the ballpark with brewers and beer drinkers alike. The party starts at 4:30pm and the game is at 6:40pm. We've got an entire section for our beer fans! This is our 2nd annual event and last year it sold out fast. Cheers!

Get Tickets Here!

events.name: Rivian Pop-up at Ounces!
events.description:
Join Rivian Automotive for a special Pop-Up Event at Ounces, special for Seattle Beer Week! Event includes a Rivian Owner Meetup, Alki Cruise, Rivian Swag Giveaways and free Educational Drives with Rivian. All Ages Welcome!

Full details here: https://www.ounceswestseattle.com/rivian-pop-up

events.description:
Come join us for a hands-on workshop
where you'll learn how to make
charcuterie creations while sipping

https://www.eventbrite.com/o/boards-by-erica-104721276261

events.name: Matchless Matchbox Happy Hour
events.description: Drink some of Tumwater's finest craft beer and race your friends on a custom Matchbox track! (Cars will be provided, but feel free to bring your own!

events.name: Pet-a-Pup!
events.description:
Come snuggle some adorable German Shepherd Puppies and find out how you can take one home! Special for Seattle Beer Week, we've partnered with the Washington German Shepherd Rescue for a special adoption event to help find local German Shepherd Puppies their forever homes! Stop by to pet a puppy AND sip a pint of the official SBW Beer while you are at it!

Details here:
https://www.ounceswestseattle.com/events/pet-a-pup

events.name: Rice Lager Weekend
events.description: Want wind down your beer week with a few days of Japanese rice lagers, city pop music, and classic Japanese cult movies, we got you covered! We’ll be putting 8 different rice lagers on tap all weekend. Featuring Obelisk, Ladd & Lass, Lucky Envelope, Asahi, and more!!

events.name: Pints with a Purpose
events.description: Close out Seattle Beer week at our Georgetown location to get your drink and your altruism on. We'll have a selection of awesome beers with $1 form each purchase being donated to Saving Great Animals dog rescue.

events.name: Pints with a Purpose
events.description: Close out Seattle Beer week at our Ballard location to get your drink and your altruism on. We'll have a selection of awesome beers with $1 form each purchase being donated to the Ballard Food Bank.

events.name: Tour De Pints
events.description:
The Tour de Pints is an annual bike ride throughout Seattle to visit a bunch of breweries and drink a bunch of beer! Can't beat that!
The full route has not been announced yet, but you can expect somewhere around 25 miles of bike path, bike lane, and safe road riding that will take you to approximately five breweries. The route will end in Ballard, not too far from the start point. The ride is unsupported, but there will be plenty of food options around to keep you fueled up along the way.
At each stop, there will be raffles for prizes, as if you need an excuse to ride bikes and drink beers!
The event is totally free to attend, though donations are accepted by purchasing a donation ticket. No purchase required. Drinking beer is not required, or even advisable. Know your limits!
The route will be revealed as the event draws nearer!
RSVP Here: https://www.eventbrite.com/e/tour-de-pints-2025-tickets-1317605195609

events.name: Paint & Sip
events.description: Paint and Sip. Fee includes all your paint supplies. Beverages not included but discounted for event

events.name: Metier Brewing hosts Encore Music Showcase
events.description: Each month our magical Encore Music Showcase features local musical artists from our beloved Hopvine Open Mic. This month Metier Brewing Company is hosting with 3 delicious beers on tap and fun swag giveaways. You extra extra don't want to miss this event!

events.name: Sour Hour! Urban Family Brewing's Comedy night!
events.description: Join us for an hour(ish) of comedy hosted by Annie Sutherland in our production space! Tickets available at UrbanFamilyBrewing.com

events.name: Beer, Burlesque & More
events.description:
Hosted by Rowan Ruthless and featuring @rubymimosa, @therockabillybarbie,, @pwillowburlesque, @genuineporcelain
& Peaches & Tease, our delightfully
naughty sour!

Tickets available here: https://www.eventbrite.com/e/beerlesque-tickets-1342874326259?aff=oddtdtcreator

events.name: BODACIOUS BEVERAGES!
events.description: Twenty rare & unusual beers from around the world! Barrel-aged brews, sour beers, hoppy stuff, and more! Taster trays & designated drivers encouraged!

events.name: Mario Kart 8 Deluxe Tournament with Vice Brewing
events.description:
Mario Kart is back for a special edition! We've teamed up with our pals at Vice Brewing who are bringing some of their best beers to the Latona for Seattle Beer Week!

If you've been to one of our tournaments before, you know how fun they are. If you haven't, its a good chance to drink some great local craft beer, eat some delish comfort food, meet some new people, and win some prizes!

We'll be pre-registering up to 32 racers for our single elimination tournament, so slide into our Instagram DM's (@thelatonapub) to enter!

events.name: 2nd Annual Brewer's Night Wing Competition
events.description:
15 of your favorite local breweries compete for the title and a spot on our menu! Come be a part of the action. Your ticket includes a chicken wing and a 4oz beer pairing from every brewery. Be there and cast your vote!

Tickets are $25 (online or at the door)
You'll get --
60oz of beer (3.5 beers!)
15 wings
bragging rights that you were there!

events.name: Hotdog Day Afternoon Beer Release and Hot Dog Eating Competition
events.description: Join us as we release our collaboration, "Hotdog Day Afternoon" lager with Ilk beer from Olympia. In tandem with the release, we are hosting a hotdog eating competition relay style. More details to follow.

events.name: DJ Night with BA Barleywine
events.description: DJ Night with BA Barleywine

events.description:

Full details here at:
https://www.ounceswestseattle.com/events/axe-throwing

events.name: Pig & Pint Night at Rhein Haus
events.description: It's time to swine & dine! Join us at Rhein Haus starting at 5:30pm and be ready to indulge in a plate overflowing with slow-roasted pork, alongside all your favorite Haus-made fixin's—mac & cheese, coleslaw, and honey butter brioche rolls. And what's a feast without beer? Your meal includes a pint of beer from Icicle Brewing—all for just $30. Featuring live music by DJ Krescendo and a Stein Holding competition on the patio. Meet the brewers, win some cool swag, score some Mariners tickets. See you there for some serious swine dining!

events.name: Bulgogi Sub Night
events.description: $5 Bulgogi Sub with purchase of a pint

events.name: Pints with Pauly
events.description: Don’t miss out on your second chance to kick it with Great Notion Founder and CEO, Paul! We’ll be pouring fan favorite brew Mosca Michelada for the first time this season alongside a garnish bar with all the traditional and not-so-traditional toppings.

events.name: Cask Night + $6 Thursday
events.description: We'll be tapping a cask of our Smith Cove ESB with Earl Gray tea on $6 Thursday. Get a pint of real ale for just $6 and pair it with a smoked bratwurst for just $6 more!

events.name: Underburg Open Mic
events.description: Underburg is hosting the longest running open mic on Capitol Hill! Come on in to listen to local artists share their musical passion AND drink Underburg with $1off!

events.name: BrewBQ with Ladd and Lass. Burgers, Beer and Live Music
events.description: Enjoy an evening with our friends at Ladd and Lass. There will be burgers on the grill, some amazing beer on tap and live music with Neil O'Connell

events.name: Industry Party
events.description: Seattle's Beer Industry is invited to join us for Karaoke, Tarot Card Readings and $5 pints all night! Let's celebrate our awesome beer scene together!

events.name: Beer Trivia!
events.description: Join us for a free trivia night about local (and not local) beer! Prizes for teams in 1st, 2nd and last place.

events.name: Flying Bike Mission Impossible Scavenger Hunt
events.description:
Flying Bike Brewery Presents Top Secret. Undercover. Scavenger Hunt. 

Calling all agents! Your next assignment is here...should you choose to accept it. Join us Wednesday May 14th at Flying Bike Brewery for a Mission: Impossible Scavenger Hunt Run.

events.name: Pints with Pauly
events.description: Head to our Georgetown taproom and hang with Great Notion Founder Paul and chat all things Great Notion. We're also tapping a surprise BBA from last year's Time Keeper's series!

events.name: Flying Bike Run Club Scavenger Hunt
events.description:
Lace up your sneakers and grab your beer-loving buddies — it’s time to hit the streets for the Flying Bike's Run Club Scavenger Hunt during Seattle Beer Week!

Join us for a one-of-a-kind running adventure where fitness meets fun, and craft beer is the ultimate prize. You'll be given a list of tasks to complete as you explore the neighborhood — all at your own pace. Run, jog, or walk… just don’t miss out!

Post-run beers at Flying Bike — you’ve earned it!

events.name: 5th Annual SBW CORNHOLE SHOWDOWN
events.description:
Join your friends and coworkers here for a raucous, good time WED 5/14. 6-11pm. If you were here last year...well, you know you had fun. Our 60 taps (and clean lines) are focused on Seattle & WA-based breweries and cider makers; typically you can expect 42 local kegs on tap and others waiting on deck (chances are draft from your favorite Seattle breweries). Free live music 7-9pm, good food and the annual, double elimination, SBW Corn Hole Tournament that starts off friendly enough ~ then tends to get serious. How it works is a Rep/Owner/Brewer from each brewery on hand is paired with a non-beer-biz person. Swag prizes abound. We have a lot of space and lots of boards, so typically everybody gets to play. But if you 100% want to play, show up closer to 5pm (and/or email Kelly@theGrowlerGuys.com).

So, come throw some bags, drink some great Seattle-based beer, chum up with industry friends you may already know, and just hang out for a few hours with other craft-loving guests.

It's an Open Party. Feel free to invite coworkers & friends. Great beer, food, corn hole, live music, parking ~ I feel an Underberg coming on...

events.name: Little League Home Run Release Party
events.description: Metier / Fast Fashion Collab release party!

events.name: Flight Night
events.description: Get $5 off flights all night long!

events.name: Flight Night
events.description: Get $5 off flights all day!

events.description:
Be Among the First to Experience The Hall on Occidental!
Lunch & Beers at The Hall on Occidental – 11:30 AM
Mariners vs. Yankees at T-Mobile Park – Game starts at 1:10 PM
Wednesday, May 14
Tickets: $50 (Includes lunch, beer, and game ticket)
We only have 50 tickets—grab yours now before they sell out!
Buy your tickets here --

https://www.exploretock.com/queen-anne-beerhall-seattle/event/547066/brewers-day-at-the-ballpark

events.name: 12 Pack at the Troll
events.description:
SBW's shortest event. If you know, you know.


Be respectful of the neighbors.

events.name: Urban Family Hopvine Trivia
events.description: We're tapping the Urban Family Beer Week Group Project German Style Lager for our ever popular Hopvine Trivia night with Head in the Clouds Trivia. Drink great beer, do beer trivia, and win beer prizes!

events.name: 1st Annual Latona Brewer's Spelling Bee
events.description:
8 Brewers are facing off in an orthographic smackdown of epic
proportions hosted by our Latona's Matt Carter and legendary Seattle brewer Kevin Forhan!

Come watch some of Seattle's best test their mettle against a barrage of brewers terms!

Participants:
Theo Muller (Urban Family
Robyn Schumacher (Stoup)
Katherine Gooding (Flying Bike)
Tom Furey (Halcyon)
Leslie Shore (Cold Stream Malt)
Roy McLaughlin (Big Time)
Barry Chan (Lucky Envelope)
Nick Ladd (Ladd & Lass)

events.name: Gate City IPA Trivia Night
events.description:
Join us for this Seattle Beer Week 16 event! Two rounds of trivia at 7pm and 8pm and delicious hazy IPA for a great cause. Free to play. CALL AHEAD TO RESERVE YOUR SPOT - 206.729.7433

With every pint and pitcher sold, a donation is made to North Helpline, helping to keep food on the table and a roof overhead for our neighbors. Drinking a great IPA counts as a good deed for the day!

About Gate City Community Benefit:
Hellbent Brewing, Watershed Pub & Kitchen, Project 9 Brewing, and local community partners have come together again to organize the 8th annual Seattle Beer Week event that features Hellbent Brewing’s award-winning Gate City IPA. A combination of the two Seattle neighborhoods, Northgate and Lake City, this brew celebrates the North Seattle community by raising funds for North Helpline.

Meet with North Helpline staff, win fun prizes, and enjoy Gate City IPA throughout Seattle Beer Week! Stay tuned for more details.

events.name: SBW Themed Trivia
events.description: Another round of SBW themed trivia, this time at Georgetown! Did you know that you can go to Head in the Clouds trivia at both of our locations and the questions will be fresh and new each time? Georgetown events are 21+

events.name: aSAULT of the Senses
events.description:
Food, Drink, & Music Pairing. Five course meal, each paired with a beer or beer cocktail, as well as a selection of music from SAULT mixed by DJ ABV.

https://ladyjaye.com/bbq-catering-seattle/?fbclid=IwY2xjawJ2CgBleHRuA2FlbQIxMQBicmlkETFJeXd0elRXa2tZQlMwN2piAR5w--TOnmERpi16lNVl46kNzWLwlTN8qMAPne-zTXZ5vlvhpQCERlIO0pWV-Q_aem_9fdNuWSnpanVz6lE8LRuiQ

events.name: PAPER AIRPLANE CONTEST!
events.description: You get to make three paper airplanes to compete in three categories: accuracy, landing, & free-style! Enjoy great beer and win prizes from New Belgium and Sierra Nevada!

events.name: Limited Brett Beer Release
events.description: We're tapping a single keg of our 6th Leg Black Saison (brewed in 2022 for our 6th anniversary) that was barrel aged with Brettanomyces!

events.name: Flying Bike Coop Member for a Day
events.description:
Ever wondered what it’s like to be part of a beer-loving, community-powered co-op? Now’s your chance to find out.

Join us for Flying Bike Co-op Member for a Day — an exclusive event where you get a taste of what it's like to own a part of Washington's first co-op brewery. Whether you’re a die-hard hop head or just co-op curious, this is your opportunity to sip, socialize, and see what membership is all about — no commitment required.

Expect fresh pours, good vibes, and even better beer

Saturday 5/10 and Tuesday 5/13

Come thirsty, leave inspired — and maybe even as our newest co-op member. Cheers to community, craft, and cold ones!

events.name: Around the World in Aslan Beers
events.description:
Drink Aslan beers inspired by styles from around the world!
Czech Republic: Mlíko and Šnyt pilsner pours
Mexico: Micheladas
Germany: Berliner Weisse with woodruff syrup
England: Gravity Keg of English Brown Ale
Belgium: Brett Saison

events.name: Seattle Ladies Choir
events.description:
Drink for a good cause: Reuben's Brew is donating $1 per pint sold to our nonprofit - ALL DAY!
We'll be there from 5 PM to 9 PM - join us to connect and support both the music and local brewery communities.

events.name: SBW Themed Trivia
events.description: Our weekly installation of Head in the Clouds Trivia with an SBW twist! Join us for beer-centric questions and GN lore. Prizes, bragging rights and brews await.

events.name: Mai Tai Monday with Cloudburst Brewing
events.description: Cue the tiny umbrellas & the Surf Rock! Lets drink some cold beers by the tiki bar and of course some Mai Tais with the gang from Cloudburst Brewing. We'll have beer garden games & spam pizza too.

events.name: This Is Washington Dammit!
events.description:
Thirty Washington beers from 30 breweries!
All $5 PINTS! All day, All night!
Plus, Zeeks is offering 25% off pizzas delivered to BPP!

events.name: Movie Night Mayhem - "Friendship"
events.description:
What: Bale Breaker + The Beer Authority + Watershed Pub brewed a collab West Coast IPA for a movie night pub crawl to see A24's new film, Friendship. Tim Robinson + Paul Rudd + male friendship. 93% on Rotten Tomatoes.
When: Mon 5/12
4pm "Happy Hour" at The Beer Authority
5:30 Beer + Pizza at The Watershed Pub
7:05 Movie (1 hr 40 mins)
9:00(ish) Post Movie hang at The 5th Avenue Tavern
Cost: $10 for movie ticket only. $30 "Best Friend VIP" gets you 1 tix + "unlimited" collab beer + pizza on the Shed mezzanine. Email kelsey@watershedpub.com for reservations.
Plus! "Friendship" bracelet making session(s) at the Beer Authority??

events.name: Spring Beer Fest
events.description:
This mini beer festival celebrates our new spring seasonal releases, as well as a kind of retrospective on some of our favorite releases of the last couple of months. All rounded out with some great guest taps from a bunch of great local producers and friends.

Our Spring Beer Fest will include 12 cask ales, including our Spring seasonal favorite Stinging Nettle Ale and a new version of an old Machine House classic, Oyster Stout. We will also have casks of our collaboration beers with Fast Fashion, Greyscale Brewing and Lowercase (the last ever cask of London Pilsner!).

Plus several excellent guest beers from Structures Brewing, Human People, E9, Bizarre Brewing, and ciders from Alpenfire, Woodinville and Yonder to round out our selection.

Come on by throughout the weekend to sample through everything.

Spring Beer Fest is May 9-11 at Machine House in Hillman City. Perfect timing for Seattle Beer Week, and Mothers Day! This event is free to enter and open to all ages.

events.name: Tours & Pours
events.description:
Join us for a behind-the-scenes tour of the Ladd & Lass brewery with head brewer and the ladd himself, Nick Ladd! Geek out about fermentation, learn more about L&L, and enjoy special tank pours along the way.

The complimentary tours start at 3:30pm and 5:30pm and are limited to (12) people. Get to the taproom early to snag a spot.

events.name: STOUPer Spa Day for Moms
events.description:
Mom's don't want another coffee mug- they want to relax!
Let mom escape upstairs at Stoup for some beauty & beer! She'll receive special treats, can sign up for special services, enjoy deals on beer, wine and other drinks all while being treated like the super special person they are!.
Botox and B12 shots must be booked in advance.
Special gift to those who RSVP HERE
https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScRHz4BHHP_jeLDa8kB1TZQfFCDKlUTGhNAMWsURrzp5cmjMw/viewform

events.name: Mother's Day Drag Brunch
events.description:
Celebrate the Queens in your life with beer, mimosas and Drag! The event featurs beermosas, micheladas, and lots of drag. Come at Noon to grab something to sip and snack on. Show starts at 1:00pm and is sure to make your mom or any other queen in your life feel appreciated.

https://www.eventbrite.com/e/mothers-day-drag-brunch-tickets-1316628704899?aff=oddtdtcreator

events.name: Queen of Queens Release Party
events.description: Our hazy collab with Queen Anne Beer Hall is back! Grab a pint & try Smashbox's limited Queen of Queens wing special. Buy a beer, wings, or a 4-pack and you're entered to win a $100 GN gift card.

events.name: Kalt Following: Ceremony of Lager
events.description: Kalt Following is our bi-annual lager fest we throw to celebrate all things lager! We’ll be pouring beers from breweries near and far and will feature 3 gravity kegs on the bar top. Woodshop BBQ will be at the brewery during the event as well!

Saturday 5/10 and Tuesday 5/13

Come thirsty, leave inspired — and maybe even as our newest co-op member. Cheers to community, craft, and cold ones!

events.name: Dirty Couch Brewing Anniversary Party
events.description:
Dirty Couch Brewing is celebrating our 10th anniversary and kicking off Seattle Beer Week! Come to celebrate with us at our Magnolia taproom on May 10. We will have new releases, a pig roast, and live music from our friends, Grunge Tree.

Festivities happening all day with food starting around 3 pm and music at 6:30 pm.

Dirty Couch Brewing is family and dog-friendly brewery specializing in unique barrel aged sours, while crafting more classic beer styles. We have a beer for every palate!

events.name: Haze Fest
events.description: A celebration of hazy beers that will include several new releases, some old favorites, and quite a few fun, one-off, draft-only infusions. Overall we'll have more than 16 hazy beers on tap, with many available in cans to-go. Live music by The Prospectors in the beer garden from 5 -7:00pm.

events.name: Yoga & Pints
events.description:
All-levels yoga practice led by local yogi Sarah Hager. $25 includes class + a pint or N/A Beverage.

Date: May 10, 2025

events.name: Cheese & Beer Pairing Class
events.description: Come learn about the similarities and differences between two famous fermented foods -- beer and cheese -- while we lead you through a guided tasting of 4 Outer Planet beers paired with 4 artisanal cheeses from Street Cheese!

events.name: SEATTLE CASK-O-RAMA!
events.description: TEN Seattle breweries, TEN casks on the bartop!

events.name: SBW KICK OFF!!
events.description: Join us for the official kick off of Seattle Beer Week with a ceremonial tapping of Group Project Helles Lager! The official tapping will be at 5pm!

events.name: FRYday Night!
events.description: FRY-nally. An event you can put ketchup on! It’s FRYday Night… and we’re kicking off the weekend AND Seattle Beer Week with FREE Fries for the first 100 people who buy a pint of the official beer of Seattle Beer Week! Even better, Plus, FREE SBW T-Shirt Giveaways, Live Music, FREE Treats, Special Appearances and more!
